implementation_summary: Added shared EC2 stop-failure classification and applied native output/exit-code capture to static proof, workflow smoke, model install, input install, and manual GPU stop. Coordinator and installer records now preserve stop failure category/output, avoid waiting after a rejected stop, and retain truthful final state. Static proof catches cleanup exceptions so its evidence record is still written. The remote watchdog's existing stderr/fallback contract was verified unchanged.
known_issues: No live EC2 stop rejection was induced; validation is local-only and avoids AWS state mutation.
A stop command accepted by AWS can still fail to reach stopped state; existing bounded wait/final-state checks remain authoritative.
AWS authentication remains expired, so current live EC2 state is not asserted here.
The operations harness retains the unrelated selected-inpaint refresh mismatch.
next_action: Use classified shutdown paths in future live windows and continue another concrete local non-mask implementation task while AWS authentication is expired.
